summary: OCB TITAN ERP P1 Integration Testing - Iteration 50. FIXED: Owner Edit Modal API call bug. All P1 features now working. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Owner Edit Button visible and functional for owner role.

P1_A_DISCOUNT_ENGINE.calculate_pricing: PASS - POST /api/master/calculate-pricing returns items, totals, discounts

P1_B_PRICE_LEVEL.price_for_customer: PASS - GET /api/master/price-for-customer/{product_id}/{customer_id} returns correct price level
P1_B_PRICE_LEVEL.price_levels_info: PASS - GET /api/master/price-levels returns 5 price level definitions

P1_C_OWNER_EDIT.owner_edit_button_visible: PASS - Button visible in PurchaseOrders.jsx AKSI column for owner role
P1_C_OWNER_EDIT.owner_edit_modal_opens: PASS - Clicking button opens modal with correct fields
P1_C_OWNER_EDIT.owner_edit_save_works: PASS - Saving updates data and creates audit log
P1_C_OWNER_EDIT.owner_edit_po_api: PASS - PUT /api/owner/edit/purchase-order/{id} works for owner role

bugs_fixed_this_iteration.issue: api.put() call failed because AuthContext api is fetch-based, not axios-based
bugs_fixed_this_iteration.fix: Changed api.put(endpoint, data) to api(endpoint, { method: 'PUT', body: JSON.stringify(data) })

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Owner Edit Button and Modal working

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Integration features all working: 1) Discount/Promo auto-apply APIs (/api/master/calculate-pricing, check-promotions), 2) Price Level lookup (/api/master/price-for-customer/{product}/{customer}), 3) Owner Edit Button in Purchase Orders - button visible, modal opens, save works with audit log. Frontend fix applied to OwnerEditButton.jsx for API call format.
